02 = Unable to feed self and must be assisted or supervised throughout the meal/snack.
03 = Able to take in nutrients orally and receives supplemental nutrients through a nasogastric tube or gastrostomy.
04 = Unable to take in nutrients orally and is fed nutrients through a nasogastric tube or gastrostomy.
05 = Unable to take in nutrients orally or by tube feeding. CHAR 2 x x x x x x
